title: Christology: The Person & Work of Christ
desc: A study of the Person and Work of Christ — his eternal divine nature, incarnation, two natures, threefold office, atonement, resurrection, and exaltation.

title: The Covenants
desc: Biblical theology of the covenants — from Adam through Abraham, Moses, David, and the new covenant in Christ.

title: The Holy Catholic Church
desc: A comprehensive ecclesiology study: the biblical theology of the Church — its foundations in Christ, apostolic pattern, four marks, historical development, heresies, and branches.

title: The Holy Spirit
desc: A study of the Holy Spirit — his person as the third member of the Trinity, his work in creation and redemption, and how believers are to walk in him.

title: Justification by Faith
desc: A study of justification by faith alone — how sinners are declared righteous before God through faith in Jesus Christ, not by works.

title: Prayer in the Bible
desc: A comprehensive study guide on prayer in Scripture — biblical models, types of prayer, and the theology of communion with God.

title: The Psalms
desc: A guide to the Psalms — the five books, major categories (lament, praise, penitential, royal, wisdom), and how to pray with the Psalter.

title: The Book of Revelation
desc: A reference guide to the Book of Revelation — its structure, symbols, major interpretive approaches, and theological themes.

title: Romans
desc: Chapter-by-chapter study of Paul's letter to the Romans — the gospel of God's righteousness revealed in Jesus Christ.

title: The Sermon on the Mount
desc: A verse-by-verse guide to Matthew 5–7 — the Beatitudes, the Antitheses, the Lord's Prayer, and the Two Ways.

title: Hebrews: The Better Covenant
desc: A chapter-by-chapter study of Hebrews tracking the sustained argument that Jesus is the fulfilment of the old covenant — prophet, priest, sacrifice, and covenant mediator.

title: Ephesians: Every Spiritual Blessing
desc: 6 sessions through Ephesians — from cosmic election to household ethics, Paul's most concentrated presentation of the gospel and its implications for the church.

title: Romans 1–8: The Righteousness of God
desc: 8 sessions through Romans 1–8 — the universal problem of sin, justification by faith alone, union with Christ, and life in the Spirit.

title: The Sermon on the Mount — Study Guide
desc: 5 sessions through Matthew 5–7 — the Beatitudes, the Antitheses, prayer, anxiety, and the two ways.

title: The Psalms: A 4-Week Devotional
desc: 4 sessions through lament, praise, royal-messianic, and trust psalms — learning to pray the whole Psalter with Israel.
